Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,150 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Re-exports Hono class, types (Env, Handler, Context, Request, HTTPException), and InferRequestType/InfereResponseType
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point for Hono exports
+- Copy-safe detail: Single file re-exporting Hono class and type definitions from submodules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Bindings, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, Input, Schema, RouterRoute
+- Internal names noticed: IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeTypedResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, RemoveBlankRecord
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for Hono's type system, handlers, and routing
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines all type-level constructs used throughout the codebase
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class that sets up routing with SmartRouter or custom router
+- Copy-safe detail: Minimal implementation extending HonoBase with router initialization
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class (also exported as Hono), get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use
+- Internal names noticed: notFoundHandler, errorHandler, get, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, _basePath, path, routes, _basePath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing request routing, middleware, and handler chain execution
+- Copy-safe detail: Implements HTTP method handlers, routing logic, error handling, and request dispatch
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, get, set, newResponse, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, header, res, executionCtx, event, req, var
+- Internal names noticed: DEFAULT_RENDER, render, setRenderer, setLayout, getLayout, newResponse, get, set, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, header, finalized, #rawRequest, #req, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer, #notFoundHandler, #preparedHeaders, #matchResult, #path, #var
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context providing access to request data, variables, and response helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: Manages execution lifecycle, request/response headers, context variables, and response rendering
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest, url, method, param, query, queries, header, matchRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: bodyCache, #validatedData, #matchResult, routeIndex, #getDecodedParam, #getAllDecodedParams, #getParamValue, tryDecodeURIComponent, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing typed access to URL, params, query, body, headers
+- Copy-safe detail: Parses and caches request body data, decodes URL parameters, exposes routing match results
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (symbol)
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Symbol constant for match result identity
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export for type-safe match result references
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, BodyDataValueDotAll, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form data bodies and returns typed results based on options
+- Copy-safe detail: Parses multipart/form-data and url-encoded bodies into structured objects
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Composes middleware into a single async handler using stack-based execution
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns dispatched context after executing middleware stack with error/not-found handling
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English schema: HTTPException class extending Error with status and optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: Creates response from exception or from provided res option
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client exports bringing HTTP client functionality to application consumers
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports hc client builder, parseResponse, and DetailedError
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, createProxy
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates proxy-based client with method chaining for making HTTP requests
+- Copy-safe detail: hc function returns proxied Client request builder
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, CallbackOptions, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, BuildSearch, BuildPathname, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL, Response, InferEndpointType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, InferRequestOptionsType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for client-side SDK including request/response types, method expansion, query/param serialization
+- Copy-safe detail: Contains all type-level types for client SDK usage including schema inference and URL building
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: isObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side utility functions for URL manipulation and request building
+- Copy-safe detail: Helper functions for merging objects, building search params, normalizing URLs and protocols
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch wrapper that intelligently parses response and throws structured errors on failure
+- Copy-safe detail: Returns parsed response body or throws DetailedError with status info
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter to register Hono app fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: Calls handle with app and options, registers addEventListener for 'fetch'
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names noticed: Handler type
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Returns fetch event handler function that delegates to Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: Creates async handler that calls app.fetch and falls back to custom fetch if 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent interface
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Type definition for Service Worker FetchEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: Interface extends Event with preloadResponse, clientId handling and respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+
+Task created only: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
+Verification command: Test with `git status` to check file was created, then `head -1 bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md` to verify header line starts with `# Core API Read/Write Ledger`
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact file for a core-api-read-write-ledger task. I need to:

1. First check if the bench-artifacts directory exists, and create it if it doesn't
2. Read all the listed files from the repository
3. Create a markdown file with the specified format

Let me start by checking if the bench-artifacts directory exists and create it if needed, then read all the files.
I'll create the benchmark artifact file by examining the listed source files and compiling the details in the specified format.
